			<h6 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h6"> Updated: May 12th, 2019</h6>		</div>

				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-5b538e4 elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="5b538e4" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">

		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a23faab" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<h4 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h4"> Checkpoint Tips:</h4>		</div>

						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-a02f0ca elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="a02f0ca" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<ul class="list-custom-style1">
 	<li>For registration in Sandbox, click the link <a href="https://developer.sslcommerz.com/registration/">https://developer.sslcommerz.com/registration/</a></li>
 	<li>For registration in Production, click the link <a href="https://signup.sslcommerz.com/register">https://signup.sslcommerz.com/register</a></li>
 	<li>There are two processes of integration:
<ol>
 	<li>SSLCOMMERZ Easy Checkout in your checkout page</li>
 	<li>Redirect the customer from your checkout page to SSLCOMMERZ Hosted page</li>
</ol>
</li>
 	<li>You will use three APIs of SSLCOMMERZ to complete the integration:
<ol>
 	<li>Create and Get Session</li>
 	<li>Receive Payment Notification (IPN)</li>
 	<li>Order Validation API</li>
</ol>
</li>
 	<li>You must validate your transaction and amount by calling our Order Validation API</li>
 	<li>You must develop the IPN url to receive the payment notification</li>
 	<li>Sometime you will get Risk payments (In response you will get risk properties, value will be 0 for safe, 1 for risky). It depends on you to provide the service or not</li>
</ul>								</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-81da812 elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="81da812" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a241122" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<h4 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h4"> Notification! We accept only TLS 1.2 or upper version</h4>		</div>

						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-60a4fab elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="60a4fab" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<ul class="list-custom-style1">
                            <li>To Test: You can run the below command from your server host in command line</li>
                            <li>Command: <code class="highlighter-rouge">root@server# curl "https://sandbox.sslcommerz.com/public/tls/" -v</code></li>
                            <li>Output: TLS is okay</li>
                            <li>Remarks: If you get the output as “TLS is okay”, then your server supports updated TLS</li>
                        </ul>								</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-7aacc66 elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="7aacc66" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a2423d1" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<p class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left p"> SSLCOMMERZ is the first payment gateway in Bangladesh opening doors for merchants to receive payments on the internet via their online stores. Customers are able to buy products online using their credit cards as well as bank accounts. If you are a merchant, you have come to the right place! Enhance your business by integrating SSLCOMMERZ to your online store and facilitating online payment in Bangladeshi Taka. Your customers will be able to pay for your products using local credit/debit cards like VISA, MasterCard, DBBL Nexus Card and any kind of credit card or bank accounts right from your online store. SSLCOMMERZ uses industry standard Secure Sockets Layer (SSL) technology which is used worldwide for securing data encryption.<br><br>
There are two ways to display the SSLCOMMERZ payment page for your customer.</p>		</div>

						</div>

			<p class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left p"> The Steps 1, 2 and 3 are used to make the request for a new transaction. After getting confirmation of checkout from customer, merchant server sends a request to SSLCOMMERZ server to get a Session ID. If all the credentials and mandatory fields are valid, then SSLCOMMERZ provides a Session ID to Merchant System. After receiving the Session ID, Merchant System redirects the customer to payment page with Session ID.</p>		</div>

						</div>
				</div>

			<p class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left p"> The Step 4 and 5 are processed at this stage. For any notification, SSLCOMMERZ will send HTTP message in POST method called IPN Message to the Listener which is to be configured by the Merchant at their SSLCOMMERZ Administrator Panel. After receiving the message, you must validate the message with Transaction Validation API of SSLCOMMERZ.

</p>		</div>

				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-8490c7a elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="8490c7a" data-element_type="widget" id="integration4" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a25c235" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<h2 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h2"> Initiate Payment</h2>		</div>

						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-c6f7373 elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="c6f7373" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a25cb2b" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<p class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left p"> For initiating payment processing, at first you need to enable HTTP IPN Listener to listen the payments. So that you can update your database accordingly even customer got connectivity issue to return back to your website.</p>		</div>

						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-fe7e4f8 elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="fe7e4f8" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a25d42f" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<h4 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h4"> Ready the Parameters</h4>		</div>

						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-f326e57 elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="f326e57" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a25dd4b" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<p class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left p"> Some mandatory parameters need to pass to SSLCOMMERZ. It identify your customers and orders. Also you have to pass the success, fail, cancel url to redirect your customer after pay.</p>		</div>

						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-2206293 elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="2206293" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a25e64e" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<h4 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h4"> Request Parameters
</h4>		</div>

						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-0455d04 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="0455d04" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<div class="table-responsive">
                        <table class="table table-bordered">
                            <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Param Name</th>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Data Type</th>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Description</th>
                            </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody>
                            <tr><td colspan="6"><b>Integration Required Parameters</b></td></tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">store_id</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – Your SSLCOMMERZ Store ID is the integration credential which can be collected through our managers
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">store_passwd</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – Your SSLCOMMERZ Store Password is the integration credential which can be collected through our managers
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">total_amount</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">decimal (10,2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – The amount which will process by SSLCOMMERZ. It shall be decimal value (10,2). Example : 55.40. The transaction amount must be from <b>10.00 BDT to 500000.00 BDT</b>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">currency</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (3)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – The currency type must be mentioned. It shall be three characters. Example : BDT, USD, EUR, SGD, INR, MYR, etc. If the transaction currency is not BDT, then it will be converted to BDT based on the current convert rate. Example : 1 USD = 82.22 BDT.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">tran_id</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – Unique transaction ID to identify your order in both your end and SSLCOMMERZ
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">product_category</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – Mention the product category. It is a open field. Example – clothing,shoes,watches,gift,healthcare, jewellery,top up,toys,baby care,pants,laptop,donation,etc
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">success_url</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – It is the callback URL of your website where user will redirect after successful payment (Length: 255)
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">fail_url</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – It is the callback URL of your website where user will redirect after any failure occure during payment (Length: 255)
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">cancel_url</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – It is the callback URL of your website where user will redirect if user canceled the transaction (Length: 255)
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">ipn_url</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-primary">Important! Not mandatory,<br> however better to use to avoid missing any payment notification</span> – It is the Instant Payment Notification (IPN) URL of your website where SSLCOMMERZ will send the transaction’s status (Length: 255). The data will be communicated as SSLCOMMERZ Server to your Server. So, customer session will not work.
                                    IPN is very important feature to integrate with your site(s). Some transaction could be pending or customer lost his/her session, in such cases back-end IPN plays a very important role to update your backend office.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">multi_card_name</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-info">Do not Use! If you do not customize the gateway list</span> – You can control to display the gateway list at SSLCOMMERZ gateway selection page by providing this parameters.
                                    <br>
                                    <br>brac_visa = BRAC VISA
                                    <br>dbbl_visa = Dutch Bangla VISA
                                    <br>city_visa = City Bank Visa
                                    <br>ebl_visa = EBL Visa
                                    <br>sbl_visa = Southeast Bank Visa
                                    <br>brac_master = BRAC MASTER
                                    <br>dbbl_master = MASTER Dutch-Bangla
                                    <br>city_master = City Master Card
                                    <br>ebl_master = EBL Master Card
                                    <br>sbl_master = Southeast Bank Master Card
                                    <br>city_amex = City Bank AMEX
                                    <br>qcash = QCash
                                    <br>dbbl_nexus = DBBL Nexus
                                    <br>bankasia = Bank Asia IB
                                    <br>abbank = AB Bank IB
                                    <br>ibbl = IBBL IB and Mobile Banking
                                    <br>mtbl = Mutual Trust Bank IB
                                    <br>bkash = Bkash Mobile Banking
                                    <br>dbblmobilebanking = DBBL Mobile Banking
                                    <br>city = City Touch IB
                                    <br>upay = Upay
                                    <br>tapnpay = Tap N Pay Gateway
                                    <br>
                                    <br>
                                    <br><b>GROUP GATEWAY</b>
                                    <br>internetbank = For all internet banking
                                    <br>mobilebank = For all mobile banking
                                    <br>othercard = For all cards except visa,master and amex
                                    <br>visacard = For all visa
                                    <br>mastercard = For All Master card
                                    <br>amexcard = For Amex Card
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">allowed_bin</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-info">Do not Use! If you do not control on transaction</span> – You can provide the BIN of card to allow the transaction must be completed by this BIN. You can declare by coma ‘,’ separate of these BIN.
                                    Example: 371598,371599,376947,376948,376949
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td colspan="6"><b>Parameters to Handle EMI Transaction</b></td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">emi_option</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">integer (1)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – This is mandatory if transaction is EMI enabled and Value must be 1/0. Here, 1 means customer will get EMI facility for this transaction
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">emi_max_inst_option</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">integer (2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Max instalment Option, Here customer will get 3,6, 9 instalment at gateway page
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">emi_selected_inst</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">integer (2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Customer has selected from your Site, So no instalment option will be displayed at gateway page
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">emi_allow_only</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">integer (1)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Value is 1/0, if value is 1 then only EMI transaction is possible, in payment page. No Mobile banking and internet banking channel will not display. This parameter depends on <code class="highlighter-rouge">emi_option</code> and <code class="highlighter-rouge">emi_selected_inst</code>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td colspan="6"><b>Customer Information</b></td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">cus_name</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – Your customer name to address the customer in payment receipt email
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">cus_email</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – Valid email address of your customer to send payment receipt from SSLCOMMERZ end
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">cus_add1</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – Address of your customer. Not mandatory but useful if provided
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">cus_add2</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Address line 2 of your customer. Not mandatory but useful if provided
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">cus_city</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – City of your customer. Not mandatory but useful if provided
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">cus_state</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    State of your customer. Not mandatory but useful if provided
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">cus_postcode</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – Postcode of your customer. Not mandatory but useful if provided
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">cus_country</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – Country of your customer. Not mandatory but useful if provided
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">cus_phone</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (20)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – The phone/mobile number of your customer to contact if any issue arises

                                    <p>
                                        <span class="label label-success">Required For SSLCOMMERZ_LOGISTIC</span>
                                    </p>                                    
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">cus_fax</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (20)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Fax number of your customer. Not mandatory but useful if provided
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td colspan="6"><b>Shipment Information</b></td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">shipping_method</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – Shipping method of the order. Example: YES or NO or Courier or SSLCOMMERZ_LOGISTIC. 
                                    <p>
                                        <span class="label label-success">Required For SSLCOMMERZ_LOGISTIC</span>
                                    </p>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">num_of_item</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">integer (1)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – No of product will be shipped. Example: 1 or 2 or etc

                                    <p>
                                        <span class="label label-success">Required For SSLCOMMERZ_LOGISTIC</span>
                                    </p>                                    
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">weight_of_items</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">decimal (10,2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – Weight of products will be shipped. Example: 0.5 or 2.00 or etc in kg

                                    <p>
                                        <span class="label label-success">Required For SSLCOMMERZ_LOGISTIC</span>
                                    </p>                                    
                                </td>
                            </tr>     
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">logistic_pickup_id</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – This is a id from where the SSLCOMMERZ logistic partners will come to receive your product for shipment. You will set and get this pickup information from your merchant portal provided by SSLCOMMERZ. 

                                    <p>
                                        <span class="label label-success">Required For SSLCOMMERZ_LOGISTIC</span>
                                    </p>                                    
                                </td>
                            </tr>      
                            
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">logistic_delivery_type</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – This information is required by SSLCOMMERZ logistic partners before receiving your product for shipment.  

                                    <p>
                                        <span class="label label-success">Required For SSLCOMMERZ_LOGISTIC</span>
                                    </p>                                    
                                </td>
                            </tr>                               
                            
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">ship_name</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-info">Mandatory, if shipping_method is YES</span> – Shipping Address of your order. Not mandatory but useful if provided

                                    <p>
                                        <span class="label label-success">Required For SSLCOMMERZ_LOGISTIC</span>
                                    </p>                                    
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">ship_add1</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-info">Mandatory, if shipping_method is YES</span> – Additional Shipping Address of your order. Not mandatory but useful if provided

                                    <p>
                                        <span class="label label-success">Required For SSLCOMMERZ_LOGISTIC</span>
                                    </p>                                    
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">ship_add2</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Additional Shipping Address of your order. Not mandatory but useful if provided

                                    <p>
                                        <span class="label label-success">Required For SSLCOMMERZ_LOGISTIC</span>
                                    </p>                                    
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">ship_area</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-info">Mandatory, if shipping_method is YES</span> – Shipping area of your order. Not mandatory but useful if provided

                                    <p>
                                        <span class="label label-success">Required For SSLCOMMERZ_LOGISTIC</span>
                                    </p>                                    
                                </td>
                            </tr>                            
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">ship_city</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-info">Mandatory, if shipping_method is YES</span> – Shipping city of your order. Not mandatory but useful if provided

                                    <p>
                                        <span class="label label-success">Required For SSLCOMMERZ_LOGISTIC</span>
                                    </p>                                    
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">ship_sub_city</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-info">Mandatory, if shipping_method is YES</span> – Shipping sub city or sub-district or thana of your order. Not mandatory but useful if provided

                                    <p>
                                        <span class="label label-success">Required For SSLCOMMERZ_LOGISTIC</span>
                                    </p>                                    
                                </td>
                            </tr>                            
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">ship_state</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Shipping state of your order. Not mandatory but useful if provided
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">ship_postcode</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-info">Mandatory, if shipping_method is YES</span> – Shipping postcode of your order. Not mandatory but useful if provided

                                    <p>
                                        <span class="label label-success">Required For SSLCOMMERZ_LOGISTIC</span>
                                    </p>                                    
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">ship_country</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-info">Mandatory, if shipping_method is YES</span> – Shipping country of your order. Not mandatory but useful if provided
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td colspan="6"><b>Product Information</b></td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">product_name</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – Mention the product name briefly. Mention the product name by coma separate. Example: Computer,Speaker
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">product_category</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (100)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – Mention the product category. Example: Electronic or topup or bus ticket or air ticket
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">product_profile</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (100)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – Mention goods vertical. It is very much necessary for online transactions to avoid chargeback.
                                    <br>
                                    <b>Please use the below keys:</b>
                                    <ol>
                                        <li>general</li>
                                        <li>physical-goods</li>
                                        <li>non-physical-goods</li>
                                        <li>airline-tickets</li>
                                        <li>travel-vertical</li>
                                        <li>telecom-vertical</li>
                                    </ol>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">hours_till_departure</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-info">Mandatory, if product_profile is airline-tickets</span> – Provide the remaining time of departure of flight till at the time of purchasing the ticket. Example: 12 hrs or 36 hrs
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">flight_type</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-info">Mandatory, if product_profile is airline-tickets</span> – Provide the flight type. Example: Oneway or Return or Multistop
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">pnr</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-info">Mandatory, if product_profile is airline-tickets</span> – Provide the PNR.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">journey_from_to</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-info">Mandatory, if product_profile is airline-tickets</span> – Provide the journey route. Example: DAC-CGP or DAC-CGP CGP-DAC
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">third_party_booking</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (20)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-info">Mandatory, if product_profile is airline-tickets</span> – No/Yes. Whether the ticket has been taken from third party booking system.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">hotel_name</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-info">Mandatory, if product_profile is travel-vertical</span> – Please provide the hotel name. Example: Sheraton
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">length_of_stay</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-info">Mandatory, if product_profile is travel-vertical</span> – How long stay in hotel. Example: 2 days
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">check_in_time</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-info">Mandatory, if product_profile is travel-vertical</span> – Checking hours for the hotel room. Example: 24 hrs
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">hotel_city</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-info">Mandatory, if product_profile is travel-vertical</span> – Location of the hotel. Example: Dhaka
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">product_type</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-info">Mandatory, if product_profile is telecom-vertical</span> – For mobile or any recharge, this information is necessary. Example: Prepaid or Postpaid
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">topup_number</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (150)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-info">Mandatory, if product_profile is telecom-vertical</span> – Provide the mobile number which will be recharged. Example: 8801700000000 or 8801700000000,8801900000000
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">country_topup</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-info">Mandatory, if product_profile is telecom-vertical</span> – Provide the country name in where the service is given. Example: Bangladesh
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">cart</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">json</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    JSON data with two elements. <b>product</b> : Max 255 characters, <b>quantity</b> : Quantity in numeric value and <b>amount</b> : Decimal (12,2)
                                    <br>
                                    Example:<br>
                                    <code>[{"sku":"REF00001","product":"DHK TO BRS AC A1","quantity":"1","amount":"200.00","unit_price":"200.00"},{"sku":"REF00002","product":"DHK TO BRS AC A2","quantity":"1","amount":"200.00","unit_price":"200.00"},{"sku":"REF00003","product":"DHK TO BRS AC A3","quantity":"1","amount":"200.00","unit_price":"200.00"},{"sku":"REF00004","product":"DHK TO BRS AC A4","quantity":"2","amount":"200.00","unit_price":"100.00"}]</code>

                                    <p>
                                        <span class="label label-success">Required For SSLCOMMERZ_LOGISTIC</span>
                                    </p>                                    
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">product_amount</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">decimal (10,2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Product price which will be displayed in your merchant panel and will help you to reconcile the transaction. It shall be decimal value (10,2). Example : 50.40
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">vat</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">decimal (10,2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    The VAT included on the product price which will be displayed in your merchant panel and will help you to reconcile the transaction. It shall be decimal value (10,2). Example : 4.00
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">discount_amount</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">decimal (10,2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Discount given on the invoice which will be displayed in your merchant panel and will help you to reconcile the transaction. It shall be decimal value (10,2). Example : 2.00
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">convenience_fee</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">decimal (10,2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Any convenience fee imposed on the invoice which will be displayed in your merchant panel and will help you to reconcile the transaction. It shall be decimal value (10,2). Example : 3.00
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td colspan="6"><b>Customized or Additional Parameters</b></td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">value_a</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Extra parameter to pass your meta data if it is needed. Not mandatory
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">value_b</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Extra parameter to pass your meta data if it is needed. Not mandatory
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">value_c</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Extra parameter to pass your meta data if it is needed. Not mandatory
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">value_d</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Extra parameter to pass your meta data if it is needed. Not mandatory
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>

                        <br>
                        <p>
                            <strong>New Notification</strong>: The parameters in where this text <span class="label label-success">Required For SSLCOMMERZ_LOGISTIC</span> is mentioned, it must be required for the new logistic support provided by SSLCOMMERZ from 1st October 2022.
                        </p>                           
                    </div>								</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-9a6544c elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="9a6544c" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a260607" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<h4 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h4"> Returned Parameters</h4>		</div>

						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-8332dfe elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="8332dfe" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<div class="table-responsive">
                        <table class="table table-bordered">
                            <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Param Name</th>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Data Type</th>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Description</th>
                            </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">status</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (10)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    API connectivity status. If all the required data is provided, then it will return as <b><span class="text-success">SUCCESS</span></b>, neither it will be <b><span class="text-danger">FAILED</span></b>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">failedreason</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    If API connectivity is failed then it returns the reason.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">sessionkey</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    A unique session key which must be saved at your system to query the transaction status any time (if required).
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">gw</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    It will list all active gateways. If you add this key with the parameter of <b>redirectGatewayURL</b>, then it will be redirected to that gateway directly.
                                    All these gateway keys are classified into six major categories. Such as <b>visa</b>, <b>master</b>, <b>amex</b>, <b>othercards</b>, <b>internetbanking</b> and <b>mobilebanking</b>.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">GatewayPageURL</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    The URL to where you will redirect the customer to pay. <span class="text-danger">This is the main URL which you will use for the integration.</span>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">storeBanner</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    It will return the image URL if any banner is uploaded against the store.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">storeLogo</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    It will return the image URL if any logo is uploaded against the store.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">desc</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    All gateways’ brief description. If you want to know about the individual gateway key, then this parameter will help you. Example: search <b>visacard</b> in the element <b>gw</b> of this parameter, then you will get the gateway <b>name</b>, <b>type</b> and <b>logo</b>.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>								</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-b0027fe elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="b0027fe" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a26179e" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<h4 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h4"> CREATE and GET Session</h4>		</div>

						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-231a16d elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="231a16d" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>Make an array by using those parameters fill with data, You need to create session at SSLCOMMERZ end. You have to call initiation API to generate session and get in response.</p>								</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-258aacd elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="258aacd" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<pre class="prettyprint prettyprinted" style=""><span class="pln">POST gwprocess</span><span class="pun">/</span><span class="pln">v4</span><span class="pun">/</span><span class="pln">api</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pln">php

</span><span class="typ">Request</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="typ">Example</span><span class="pln">

$ curl </span><span class="pun">-</span><span class="pln">X POST https</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="com">//sandbox.sslcommerz.com/gwprocess/v4/api.php</span><span class="pln">
</span><span class="pun">-</span><span class="pln">d
</span><span class="str">'store_id=testbox&
store_passwd=qwerty&
total_amount=100&
currency=EUR&
tran_id=REF123&
success_url=http://yoursite.com/success.php&
fail_url=http://yoursite.com/fail.php&
cancel_url=http://yoursite.com/cancel.php&
cus_name=Customer Name&
cus_email=cust@yahoo.com&
cus_add1=Dhaka&
cus_add2=Dhaka&
cus_city=Dhaka&
cus_state=Dhaka&
cus_postcode=1000&
cus_country=Bangladesh&
cus_phone=01711111111&
cus_fax=01711111111&
ship_name=Customer Name&
ship_add1 =Dhaka&
ship_add2=Dhaka&
ship_city=Dhaka&
ship_state=Dhaka&
ship_postcode=1000&
ship_country=Bangladesh&
multi_card_name=mastercard,visacard,amexcard&
value_a=ref001_A&
value_b=ref002_B&
value_c=ref003_C&
value_d=ref004_D'</span><span class="pln">


</span><span class="typ">Response</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="typ">Example</span><span class="pln">
</span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pln">
   </span><span class="str">"status"</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="str">"SUCCESS"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln">
   </span><span class="str">"failedreason"</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="str">""</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln">
   </span><span class="str">"sessionkey"</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="str">"F298BC45B0688E02768900C4F6B28C8B"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln">
   </span><span class="str">"gw"</span><span class="pun">:{</span><span class="pln">
      </span><span class="str">"visa"</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="str">"dbbl_visa,brac_visa,city_visa,ebl_visa,visacard"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln">
      </span><span class="str">"master"</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="str">"dbbl_master,brac_master,city_master,ebl_master,mastercard"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln">
      </span><span class="str">"amex"</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="str">"city_amex,amexcard"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln">
      </span><span class="str">"othercards"</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="str">"dbbl_nexus,qcash,fastcash"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln">
      </span><span class="str">"internetbanking"</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="str">"city,bankasia,ibbl,mtbl"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln">
      </span><span class="str">"mobilebanking"</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="str">"dbblmobilebanking,bkash,abbank,ibbl"</span><span class="pln">
   </span><span class="pun">},</span><span class="pln">
   </span><span class="str">"redirectGatewayURL"</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="str">"https:\/\/sandbox.sslcommerz.com\/gwprocess\/v4\/bankgw\/indexhtml.php?mamount=10228.84&ssl_id=19021022820J3Tctm708jSQiZU&Q=REDIRECT&SESSIONKEY=F298BC45B0688E02768900C4F6B28C8B&tran_type=success&cardname="</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln">
   </span><span class="str">"directPaymentURLBank"</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="str">"https:\/\/sandbox.sslcommerz.com\/gwprocess\/v4\/bankgw\/indexhtmlOTP.php?mamount=10228.84&ssl_id=19021022820J3Tctm708jSQiZU&Q=REDIRECT&SESSIONKEY=F298BC45B0688E02768900C4F6B28C8B&tran_type=success&cardname=visavard"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln">
   </span><span class="str">"directPaymentURLCard"</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="str">""</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln">
   </span><span class="str">"directPaymentURL"</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="str">""</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln">
   </span><span class="str">"redirectGatewayURLFailed"</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="str">""</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln">
   </span><span class="str">"GatewayPageURL"</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="str">"https:\/\/sandbox.sslcommerz.com\/gwprocess\/v4\/gw.php?Q=PAY&SESSIONKEY=F298BC45B0688E02768900C4F6B28C8B"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln">

									<pre class="prettyprint prettyprinted" style=""><span class="com">/* PHP */</span><span class="pln">
$post_data </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> array</span><span class="pun">();</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'store_id'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"testbox"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'store_passwd'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"qwerty"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'total_amount'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"103"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'currency'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"BDT"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'tran_id'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"SSLCZ_TEST_"</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pln">uniqid</span><span class="pun">();</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'success_url'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"http://localhost/new_sslcz_gw/success.php"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'fail_url'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"http://localhost/new_sslcz_gw/fail.php"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'cancel_url'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"http://localhost/new_sslcz_gw/cancel.php"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
</span><span class="com"># $post_data['multi_card_name'] = "mastercard,visacard,amexcard";  # DISABLE TO DISPLAY ALL AVAILABLE</span><span class="pln">

</span><span class="com"># EMI INFO</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'emi_option'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"1"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'emi_max_inst_option'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"9"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'emi_selected_inst'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"9"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">

</span><span class="com"># CUSTOMER INFORMATION</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'cus_name'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"Test Customer"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'cus_email'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"test@test.com"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'cus_add1'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"Dhaka"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'cus_add2'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"Dhaka"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'cus_city'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"Dhaka"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'cus_state'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"Dhaka"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'cus_postcode'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"1000"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'cus_country'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"Bangladesh"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'cus_phone'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"01711111111"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'cus_fax'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"01711111111"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">

</span><span class="com"># SHIPMENT INFORMATION</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'ship_name'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"Store Test"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'ship_add1 '</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"Dhaka"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'ship_add2'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"Dhaka"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'ship_city'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"Dhaka"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'ship_state'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"Dhaka"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'ship_postcode'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"1000"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'ship_country'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"Bangladesh"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">

</span><span class="com"># OPTIONAL PARAMETERS</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'value_a'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"ref001"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'value_b '</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"ref002"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'value_c'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"ref003"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'value_d'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"ref004"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">

</span><span class="com"># CART PARAMETERS</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'cart'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> json_encode</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">array</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">
    array</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">"product"</span><span class="pun">=></span><span class="str">"DHK TO BRS AC A1"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="str">"amount"</span><span class="pun">=></span><span class="str">"200.00"</span><span class="pun">),</span><span class="pln">
    array</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">"product"</span><span class="pun">=></span><span class="str">"DHK TO BRS AC A2"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="str">"amount"</span><span class="pun">=></span><span class="str">"200.00"</span><span class="pun">),</span><span class="pln">
    array</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">"product"</span><span class="pun">=></span><span class="str">"DHK TO BRS AC A3"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="str">"amount"</span><span class="pun">=></span><span class="str">"200.00"</span><span class="pun">),</span><span class="pln">
    array</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">"product"</span><span class="pun">=></span><span class="str">"DHK TO BRS AC A4"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="str">"amount"</span><span class="pun">=></span><span class="str">"200.00"</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pln">
</span><span class="pun">));</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'product_amount'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"100"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'vat'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"5"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'discount_amount'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"5"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'convenience_fee'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"3"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
