				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-a2920f3 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="a2920f3" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<pre class="prettyprint prettyprinted" style=""><span class="pln">
</span><span class="com"># REQUEST SEND TO SSLCOMMERZ</span><span class="pln">
$direct_api_url </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"https://sandbox.sslcommerz.com/gwprocess/v4/api.php"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">

$handle </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> curl_init</span><span class="pun">();</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> $direct_api_url </span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_TIMEOUT</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="lit">30</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="lit">30</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_POST</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="lit">1</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> $post_data</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">true</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> FALSE</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="com"># KEEP IT FALSE IF YOU RUN FROM LOCAL PC</span><span class="pln">


$content </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> curl_exec</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle </span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

$code </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> curl_getinfo</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

</span><span class="kwd">if</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$code </span><span class="pun">==</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="lit">200</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">&&</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">!(</span><span class="pln"> curl_errno</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">)))</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pln">
	curl_close</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln"> $handle</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
	$sslcommerzResponse </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $content</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">else</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pln">
	curl_close</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln"> $handle</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
	echo </span><span class="str">"FAILED TO CONNECT WITH SSLCOMMERZ API"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	</span><span class="kwd">exit</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pln">

</span><span class="com"># PARSE THE JSON RESPONSE</span><span class="pln">
$sslcz </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> json_decode</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$sslcommerzResponse</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">true</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

</span><span class="kwd">if</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">isset</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$sslcz</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'GatewayPageURL'</span><span class="pun">])</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">&&</span><span class="pln"> $sslcz</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'GatewayPageURL'</span><span class="pun">]!=</span><span class="str">""</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pln">
        </span><span class="com"># THERE ARE MANY WAYS TO REDIRECT - Javascript, Meta Tag or Php Header Redirect or Other</span><span class="pln">
        </span><span class="com"># echo "<script>window.location.href = '". $sslcz['GatewayPageURL'] ."';</script>";</span><span class="pln">
	echo </span><span class="str">"<meta http-equiv='refresh' content='0;url="</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pln">$sslcz</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'GatewayPageURL'</span><span class="pun">].</span><span class="str">"'>"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	</span><span class="com"># header("Location: ". $sslcz['GatewayPageURL']);</span><span class="pln">
	</span><span class="kwd">exit</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">else</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pln">
	echo </span><span class="str">"JSON Data parsing error!"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
</span><span class="pun">}</span></pre>								</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-2b10a73 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="2b10a73" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>You have to parse <strong>GatewayPageURL</strong> field from this json response and redirect user to this url.</p>								</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-2f7da4e elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="2f7da4e" data-element_type="widget" id="integration5" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a2660a8" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<h2 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h2"> Validate Payment with IPN</h2>		</div>

						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-416a4d5 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="416a4d5" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>Remember, We have set an IPN URL in first step so that your server can listen at the right moment when payment is done at Bank End. So, It is important to validate the transaction notification to maintain security and standard.</p>								</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-a261e17 elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="a261e17" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a266fba" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<h4 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h4"> Grab the Notification</h4>		</div>

						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-3f7c4c0 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="3f7c4c0" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>As IPN URL already set in panel. All the payment notification will reach through IPN prior to user return back. So it needs validation for amount and transaction properly.<br><br>The IPN will send a <b>POST REQUEST</b> with below parameters. Grab the post notification with your desired platform ( PHP: $_POST)</p>								</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-70ce5e8 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="70ce5e8" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<div class="table-responsive">
                        <table class="table table-bordered">
                            <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Param Name</th>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Data Type</th>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Description</th>
                            </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">status</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (20)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Transaction Status – as VALID / FAILED / CANCELLED / EXPIRED / UNATTEMPTED <span class="text-danger">This parameter needs to be checked before update your database</span>
                                    <ul>
                                        <li><b>VALID</b> : A successful transaction.</li>
                                        <li><b>FAILED</b> : Transaction is declined by customer’s Issuer Bank.</li>
                                        <li><b>CANCELLED</b> : Transaction is cancelled by the customer.</li>
                                        <li><b>UNATTEMPTED</b> : Customer did not choose to pay any channel.</li>
                                        <li><b>EXPIRED</b> : Payment Timeout.</li>
                                    </ul>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">tran_date</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">datetime</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Transaction date – Payment completion date as 2016-05-08 15:53:49 ( PHP date(‘Y-m-d H:i:s’) )
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">tran_id</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Transaction ID (Unique) that was sent by you during initiation. <span class="text-danger">This parameter needs to be validated with your system database for security</span>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">val_id</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    A Validation ID against the Transaction which is provided by SSLCOMMERZ.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">amount</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">decimal (10,2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    The total amount sent by you. However, it could be changed based on currency type. <span class="text-danger">This parameter needs to be validated with your system database for security</span>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">store_amount</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">decimal (10,2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    The amount what you will get in your account after bank charge ( Example: 100 BDT will be your store amount of 96 BDT after 4% Bank Commission )
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">card_type</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    The Bank Gateway Name that customer selected
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">card_no</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (80)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Customer’s Card number. However, for Mobile Banking and Internet Banking, it will return customer’s reference id.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">currency</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (3)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Currency Type which will be settled with your merchant account after deducting the Gateway charges. This parameter is the currency type of the parameter <b>amount</b>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">bank_tran_id</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (80)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    The transaction ID at Banks End
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">card_issuer</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (100)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Issuer Bank Name
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">card_brand</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    VISA, MASTER, AMEX, IB or MOBILE BANKING
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">card_issuer_country</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Country of Card Issuer Bank
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">card_issuer_country_code</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    2 digits short code of Country of Card Issuer Bank
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">currency_type</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (3)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    The currency you have sent during initiation of this transaction. If the currency is different than BDT, then it will be converted to BDT by the current conversion rate. <span class="text-danger">This parameter needs to be validated with your system database for security</span>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">currency_amount</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">decimal (10,2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    The currency amount you have sent during initiation of this transaction. If the amount is not mentioned in BDT, then it will be converted to BDT by the current conversion rate and return by the above field <b>amount</b>. <span class="text-danger">This parameter needs to be validated with your system database for security</span>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">value_a</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Same Value will be returned as Passed during initiation
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">value_b</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Same Value will be returned as Passed during initiation
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">value_c</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Same Value will be returned as Passed during initiation
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">value_d</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Same Value will be returned as Passed during initiation
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">verify_sign</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Data Validation Key
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">verify_key</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Data Validation Key
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">risk_level</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">integer (1)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Transaction’s Risk Level – High (1) for most risky transactions and Low (0) for safe transactions. Please hold the service and proceed to collect customer verification documents
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">risk_title</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Transaction’s Risk Level Description
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>								</div>
				</div>

				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-75c8da1 elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="75c8da1" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a268ff0" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<h4 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h4"> Order Validation API</h4>		</div>

				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-89b3b46 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="89b3b46" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>After knowing that the post keys are valid and no moletion done with the request, now it is the time to validate your transaction for amount and transaction. It will only treated as valid if amount and transaction status are valid at SSL End<br><br>So, Let’s call the API and the example given below</p>								</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-a98a9df elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="a98a9df" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a269dee" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<h4 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h4"> REST API</h4>		</div>

						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-92fa27e elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="92fa27e" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>API Endpoint (Sandbox/Test Environment): <a href="https://sandbox.sslcommerz.com/validator/api/validationserverAPI.php" target="_blank" rel="noopener">https://sandbox.sslcommerz.com/validator/api/validationserverAPI.php</a></p><p>API Endpoint (Live Environment): <a href="https://securepay.sslcommerz.com/validator/api/validationserverAPI.php" target="_blank" rel="noopener">https://securepay.sslcommerz.com/validator/api/validationserverAPI.php</a></p><p>Method: GET</p>								</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-6b990ff elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="6b990ff" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a26ac58" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<h4 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h4"> Request Parameters</h4>		</div>

						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-dd25ecc elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="dd25ecc" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<div class="table-responsive">
                        <table class="table table-bordered">
                            <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Param Name</th>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Data Type</th>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Description</th>
                            </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">val_id</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – A Validation ID against the successful transaction which is provided by SSLCOMMERZ.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">store_id</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – Your SSLCOMMERZ Store ID is the integration credential which can be collected through our managers
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">store_passwd</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – Your SSLCOMMERZ Store Password is the integration credential which can be collected through our managers
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">format</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (10)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Predefined value is json or xml. This parameter is used to get the response in two different format such as <b>json</b> or <b>xml</b>. By default it returns json format.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">v</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">integer (1)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Open for future use only.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>								</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-bfa3484 elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="bfa3484" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a26bb4b" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<h4 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h4"> Returned Parameters</h4>		</div>

						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-fbcc5bf elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="fbcc5bf" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<div class="table-responsive">
                        <table class="table table-bordered">
                            <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Param Name</th>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Data Type</th>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Description</th>
                            </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">status</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (20)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Transaction Status. <span class="text-danger">This parameter needs to be checked before update your database as a successful transaction.</span>
                                    <ul>
                                        <li><b>VALID</b> : A successful transaction.</li>
                                        <li><b>VALIDATED</b> : A successful transaction but called by your end more than one.</li>
                                        <li><b>INVALID_TRANSACTION</b> : Invalid validation id (val_id).</li>
                                    </ul>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">tran_date</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">datetime</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Transaction date – Payment completion date as 2016-05-08 15:53:49 ( PHP date(‘Y-m-d H:i:s’) )
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">tran_id</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Transaction ID (Unique) that was sent by you during initiation. <span class="text-danger">This parameter needs to be validated with your system database for security</span>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">val_id</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    A Validation ID against the Transaction which is provided by SSLCOMMERZ.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">amount</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">decimal (10,2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    The total amount sent by you. However, it could be changed based on currency type. <span class="text-danger">This parameter needs to be validated with your system database for security</span>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">store_amount</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">decimal (10,2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    The amount what you will get in your account after bank charge ( Example: 100 BDT will be your store amount of 96 BDT after 4% Bank Commission )
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">card_type</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    The Bank Gateway Name that customer selected
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">card_no</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (80)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Customer’s Card number. However, for Mobile Banking and Internet Banking, it will return customer’s reference id.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">currency</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (3)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Currency Type which will be settled with your merchant account after deducting the Gateway charges. This parameter is the currency type of the parameter <b>amount</b>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">bank_tran_id</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (80)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    The transaction ID at Banks End
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">card_issuer</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Issuer Bank Name
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">card_brand</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    VISA, MASTER, AMEX, IB or MOBILE BANKING
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">card_issuer_country</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Country of Card Issuer Bank
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">card_issuer_country_code</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    2 digits short code of Country of Card Issuer Bank
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">currency_type</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (3)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    The currency you have sent during initiation of this transaction. If the currency is different than BDT, then it will be converted to BDT by the current conversion rate. <span class="text-danger">This parameter needs to be validated with your system database for security</span>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">currency_amount</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">decimal (10,2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    The currency amount you have sent during initiation of this transaction. If the amount is not mentioned in BDT, then it will be converted to BDT by the current conversion rate and return by the above field <b>amount</b>. <span class="text-danger">This parameter needs to be validated with your system database for security</span>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">emi_instalment</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">integer (2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Tenure of the EMI transaction which is choosen by the customer.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">emi_amount</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">decimal (10,2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    EMI charge which will be paid to the Issuer Bank
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">discount_amount</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">decimal (10,2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    If customer gets any discount based on the campaign is managed by both you and SSLCOMMERZ.Here, it will return the amount which is given as discount.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">discount_percentage</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">decimal (10,2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    If customer gets any discount based on the campaign is managed by both you and SSLCOMMERZ. Here, it will return the discount percentage.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">discount_remarks</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Short description of the campaign which is managed by both you and SSLCOMMERZ.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">value_a</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Same Value will be returned as Passed during initiation
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">value_b</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Same Value will be returned as Passed during initiation
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">value_c</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Same Value will be returned as Passed during initiation
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">value_d</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Same Value will be returned as Passed during initiation
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">risk_level</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">integer (1)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Transaction’s Risk Level – High (1) for most risky transactions and Low (0) for safe transactions. Please hold the service and proceed to collect customer verification documents
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">risk_title</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Transaction’s Risk Level Description
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>								</div>

			<h4 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h4"> <span style="background-color:#003E78;color:#fff;padding:3px">PHP Code</span> to Call the Validation API</h4>		</div>

									<pre class="prettyprint prettyprinted" style=""><span class="pln">
$val_id</span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln">urlencode</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$_POST</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'val_id'</span><span class="pun">]);</span><span class="pln">
$store_id</span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln">urlencode</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">"testbox"</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
$store_passwd</span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln">urlencode</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">"qwerty"</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
$requested_url </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">"https://sandbox.sslcommerz.com/validator/api/validationserverAPI.php?val_id="</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pln">$val_id</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="str">"&store_id="</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pln">$store_id</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="str">"&store_passwd="</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pln">$store_passwd</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="str">"&v=1&format=json"</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

$handle </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> curl_init</span><span class="pun">();</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> $requested_url</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">true</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">false</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="com"># IF YOU RUN FROM LOCAL PC</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">false</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="com"># IF YOU RUN FROM LOCAL PC</span><span class="pln">

$result </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> curl_exec</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

$code </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> curl_getinfo</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

</span><span class="kwd">if</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$code </span><span class="pun">==</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="lit">200</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">&&</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">!(</span><span class="pln"> curl_errno</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">)))</span><span class="pln">
</span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pln">

	</span><span class="com"># TO CONVERT AS ARRAY</span><span class="pln">
	</span><span class="com"># $result = json_decode($result, true);</span><span class="pln">
	</span><span class="com"># $status = $result['status'];</span><span class="pln">

	</span><span class="com"># TO CONVERT AS OBJECT</span><span class="pln">
	$result </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> json_decode</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$result</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

	</span><span class="com"># TRANSACTION INFO</span><span class="pln">
	$status </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">status</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$tran_date </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">tran_date</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$tran_id </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">tran_id</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$val_id </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">val_id</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$amount </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">amount</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$store_amount </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">store_amount</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$bank_tran_id </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">bank_tran_id</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$card_type </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">card_type</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">

	</span><span class="com"># EMI INFO</span><span class="pln">
	$emi_ instalment </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">emi_instalment</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$emi_ amount </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">emi_ amount</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$emi_description </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">emi_description</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$emi_issuer </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">emi_issuer</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">

	</span><span class="com"># ISSUER INFO</span><span class="pln">
	$card_no </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">card_no</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$card_issuer </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">card_issuer</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$card_brand </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">card_brand</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$card_issuer_country </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">card_issuer_country</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$card_issuer_country_code </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">card_issuer_country_code</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">

	</span><span class="com"># API AUTHENTICATION</span><span class="pln">
	$APIConnect </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="typ">APIConnect</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$validated_on </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">validated_on</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$gw_version </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">gw_version</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">

</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">else</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pln">

	echo </span><span class="str">"Failed to connect with SSLCOMMERZ"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pln">
</span></pre>								</div>
				</div>

	</span><span class="pun">};</span><span class="pln">

	window</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pln">addEventListener </span><span class="pun">?</span><span class="pln"> window</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pln">addEventListener</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">"load"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> loader</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">false</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="pln"> window</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pln">attachEvent</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">"onload"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> loader</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
</span><span class="pun">})(</span><span class="pln">window</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> document</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

	</span><span class="kwd">var</span><span class="pln"> loader </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">function</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">()</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pln">
		</span><span class="kwd">var</span><span class="pln"> script </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> document</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pln">createElement</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">"script"</span><span class="pun">),</span><span class="pln"> tag </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> document</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pln">getElementsByTagName</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">"script"</span><span class="pun">)[</span><span class="lit">0</span><span class="pun">];</span><span class="pln">
		script</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pln">src </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"https://seamless-epay.sslcommerz.com/embed.min.js?"</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">+</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="typ">Math</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pln">random</span><span class="pun">().</span><span class="pln">toString</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="lit">36</span><span class="pun">).</span><span class="pln">substring</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="lit">7</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

	</span><span class="pun">};</span><span class="pln">

	window</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pln">addEventListener </span><span class="pun">?</span><span class="pln"> window</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pln">addEventListener</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">"load"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> loader</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">false</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="pln"> window</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pln">attachEvent</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">"onload"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> loader</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
</span><span class="pun">})(</span><span class="pln">window</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> document</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-2401dd9 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="2401dd9" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<pre class="prettyprint prettyprinted" style=""><span class="tag"><button</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="atn">class</span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="atv">"your-button-class"</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="atn">id</span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="atv">"sslczPayBtn"</span><span class="pln">
		 </span><span class="atn">token</span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="atv">"if you have any token validation"</span><span class="pln">
		 </span><span class="atn">postdata</span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="atv">"your javascript arrays or objects which requires in backend"</span><span class="pln">
		 </span><span class="atn">order</span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="atv">"If you already have the transaction generated for current order"</span><span class="pln">
		 </span><span class="atn">endpoint</span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="atv">"An URL where backend code will initiate the payment to SSLCOMMERZ"</span><span class="tag">></span><span class="pln"> Pay Now
</span><span class="tag"></button></span><span class="pln">
                            		</span></pre>								</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-d8e9ff4 elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="d8e9ff4" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a2766bc" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<h4 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h4"> Backend transaction Initiation process</h4>		</div>

						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-1469e0d elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="1469e0d" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<pre class="prettyprint prettyprinted" style=""><span class="pln">
</span><span class="com">// if you have order id generated catch the order_id key and query in your database. otherwise pass json data to postdata key of button to catch here</span><span class="pln">

$post_data </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> array</span><span class="pun">();</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'store_id'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"your-store-id"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'store_passwd'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"your-store-password"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'total_amount'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"50"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'currency'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"BDT"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'tran_id'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"your unique order id"</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pln">uniqid</span><span class="pun">();</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'success_url'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"your payment application success url"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'fail_url'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"your payment application fail url"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'cancel_url'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"your payment application cancel url"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">

</span><span class="com"># CUSTOMER INFORMATION</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'cus_name'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">""</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'cus_email'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">""</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'cus_add1'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"Dhaka"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'cus_add2'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"Dhaka"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'cus_city'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"Dhaka"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'cus_state'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"Dhaka"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'cus_postcode'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"1000"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'cus_country'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"Bangladesh"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'cus_phone'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">''</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'cus_fax'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">""</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">

</span><span class="com"># SHIPMENT INFORMATION</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'ship_name'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"Store Test"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'ship_add1 '</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"Dhaka"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'ship_add2'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"Dhaka"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'ship_city'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"Dhaka"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'ship_state'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"Dhaka"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'ship_postcode'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"1000"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'ship_country'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"Bangladesh"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">

</span><span class="com"># OPTIONAL PARAMETERS</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'value_a'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"ref001"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'value_b '</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"ref002"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'value_c'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"ref003"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'value_d'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"ref004"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">

</span><span class="com"># EMI STATUS</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'emi_option'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"1"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">

</span><span class="com"># CART PARAMETERS</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'cart'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> json_encode</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">array</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">
    array</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">"product"</span><span class="pun">=></span><span class="str">"DHK TO BRS AC A1"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="str">"amount"</span><span class="pun">=></span><span class="str">"200.00"</span><span class="pun">),</span><span class="pln">
    array</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">"product"</span><span class="pun">=></span><span class="str">"DHK TO BRS AC A2"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="str">"amount"</span><span class="pun">=></span><span class="str">"200.00"</span><span class="pun">),</span><span class="pln">
    array</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">"product"</span><span class="pun">=></span><span class="str">"DHK TO BRS AC A3"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="str">"amount"</span><span class="pun">=></span><span class="str">"200.00"</span><span class="pun">),</span><span class="pln">
    array</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">"product"</span><span class="pun">=></span><span class="str">"DHK TO BRS AC A4"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="str">"amount"</span><span class="pun">=></span><span class="str">"200.00"</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pln">
</span><span class="pun">));</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'product_amount'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"100"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'vat'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"5"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'discount_amount'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"5"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
$post_data</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'convenience_fee'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"3"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">


</span><span class="com">//$post_data['allowed_bin'] = "3,4";</span><span class="pln">
</span><span class="com">//$post_data['allowed_bin'] = "470661";</span><span class="pln">
</span><span class="com">//$post_data['allowed_bin'] = "470661,376947";</span><span class="pln">


</span><span class="com"># REQUEST SEND TO SSLCOMMERZ</span><span class="pln">
$direct_api_url </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"https://securepay.sslcommerz.com/gwprocess/v4/api.php"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">

$handle </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> curl_init</span><span class="pun">();</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> $direct_api_url </span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_TIMEOUT</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="lit">30</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="lit">30</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_POST</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="lit">1</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> $post_data</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">true</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> FALSE</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="com"># KEEP IT FALSE IF YOU RUN FROM LOCAL PC</span><span class="pln">


$content </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> curl_exec</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle </span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

$code </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> curl_getinfo</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

</span><span class="kwd">if</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$code </span><span class="pun">==</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="lit">200</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">&&</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">!(</span><span class="pln"> curl_errno</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">)))</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pln">
    curl_close</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln"> $handle</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
    $sslcommerzResponse </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $content</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">else</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pln">
    curl_close</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln"> $handle</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
    echo </span><span class="str">"FAILED TO CONNECT WITH SSLCOMMERZ API"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
    </span><span class="kwd">exit</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pln">

</span><span class="com"># PARSE THE JSON RESPONSE</span><span class="pln">
$sslcz </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> json_decode</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$sslcommerzResponse</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">true</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

</span><span class="com">//var_dump($sslcz); exit;</span><span class="pln">

</span><span class="kwd">if</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">isset</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$sslcz</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'GatewayPageURL'</span><span class="pun">])</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">&&</span><span class="pln"> $sslcz</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'GatewayPageURL'</span><span class="pun">]!=</span><span class="str">""</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pln">
	</span><span class="com">// this is important to show the popup, return or echo to sent json response back</span><span class="pln">
   </span><span class="kwd">return</span><span class="pln">  json_encode</span><span class="pun">([</span><span class="str">'status'</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=></span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">'success'</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">'data'</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=></span><span class="pln"> $sslcz</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'GatewayPageURL'</span><span class="pun">],</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">'logo'</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=></span><span class="pln"> $sslcz</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'storeLogo'</span><span class="pun">]</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">]);</span><span class="pln">
</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">else</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pln">
   </span><span class="kwd">return</span><span class="pln">  json_encode</span><span class="pun">([</span><span class="str">'status'</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=></span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">'fail'</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">'data'</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=></span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">null</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">'message'</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">=></span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"JSON Data parsing error!"</span><span class="pun">]);</span><span class="pln">
</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pln">
                            		</span></pre>								</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-b10dad1 elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="b10dad1" data-element_type="widget" id="integration8" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">

				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a278709" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<h4 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h4"> Initiate The Refund</h4>		</div>
