				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-0083122 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="0083122" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>So, Let’s call the API and the example given below</p>								</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-21f3a02 elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="21f3a02" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a279445" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<h4 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h4"> REST API</h4>		</div>

						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-524ea91 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="524ea91" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>API Endpoint (Sandbox/Test Environment):<br><a href="https://sandbox.sslcommerz.com/validator/api/merchantTransIDvalidationAPI.php" target="_blank" rel="noopener">https://sandbox.sslcommerz.com/validator/api/merchantTransIDvalidationAPI.php</a></p><p>API Endpoint (Live Environment):<br><a href="https://securepay.sslcommerz.com/validator/api/merchantTransIDvalidationAPI.php" target="_blank" rel="noopener">https://securepay.sslcommerz.com/validator/api/merchantTransIDvalidationAPI.php</a></p><p>Method: GET</p>								</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-a0b4713 elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="a0b4713" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a27a0d0" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<h4 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h4"> Request Parameters</h4>		</div>

						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-2af53cd elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="2af53cd" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<div class="table-responsive">
                        <table class="table table-bordered">
                            <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Param Name</th>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Data Type</th>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Description</th>
                            </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">bank_tran_id</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (80)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – The transaction ID at Banks End
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">store_id</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – Your SSLCOMMERZ Store ID is the integration credential which can be collected through our managers
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">store_passwd</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – Your SSLCOMMERZ Store Password is the integration credential which can be collected through our managers
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">refund_amount</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">decimal (10,2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – The amount will be refunded to card holder’s account.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">refund_remarks</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – The reason of refund.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">refe_id</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    You can provide any reference number of your system to reconcile.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">format</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (10)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Predefined value is <b>json</b> or <b>xml</b>. This parameter is used to get the response in two different format such as json or xml. By default it returns json format.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>								</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-6466625 elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="6466625" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a27aeac" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<h4 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h4"> Returned Parameters</h4>		</div>

						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-d88e9bb elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="d88e9bb" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<div class="table-responsive">
                        <table class="table table-bordered">
                            <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Param Name</th>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Data Type</th>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Description</th>
                            </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">APIConnect</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    API Connection Status –
                                    <ul>
                                        <li><b>INVALID_REQUEST</b> : Invalid data imputed to call the API</li>
                                        <li><b>FAILED</b> : API Authentication Failed</li>
                                        <li><b>INACTIVE</b> : API User/Store ID is Inactive</li>
                                        <li><b><span class="text-success">DONE</span></b> : API Connection Success</li>
                                    </ul>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">bank_tran_id</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (80)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    The transaction ID at Banks End
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">trans_id</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Will be return only when the Authentication is success and the bank_tran_id is a valid id
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>

</span><span class="typ">Response</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="typ">Example</span><span class="pln">

</span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pln">
  </span><span class="str">"APIConnect"</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"DONE"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln">
  </span><span class="str">"bank_tran_id"</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"1709162345070ANJdZV8LyI4cMw"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln">
  </span><span class="str">"trans_id"</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"SSLCZ_TEST_59bd635981a94"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln">
  </span><span class="str">"refund_ref_id"</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"59bd63fea5455"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln">
  </span><span class="str">"status"</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"success"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln">

				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-a9e8059 elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="a9e8059" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a27cf90" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<h4 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h4"> <span style="background-color:#003E78;color:#fff;padding:3px">PHP Code</span> to Initiate the Refund by API</h4>		</div>

						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-e458695 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="e458695" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<pre class="prettyprint prettyprinted" style=""><span class="pln">
$bank_tran_id</span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln">urlencode</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">'1709162345070ANJdZV8LyI4cMw'</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
$refund_amount</span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln">urlencode</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">'5.50'</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
$refund_remarks</span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln">urlencode</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">'Out of Stock'</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
$store_id</span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln">urlencode</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">"testbox"</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
$store_passwd</span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln">urlencode</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">"qwerty"</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

$requested_url </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">"https://sandbox.sslcommerz.com/validator/api/merchantTransIDvalidationAPI.php?refund_amount=$refund_amount&refund_remarks=$refund_remarks&bank_tran_id=$bank_tran_id&store_id=$store_id&store_passwd=$store_passwd&v=1&format=json"</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

$handle </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> curl_init</span><span class="pun">();</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> $requested_url</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">true</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">false</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="com"># IF YOU RUN FROM LOCAL PC</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">false</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="com"># IF YOU RUN FROM LOCAL PC</span><span class="pln">

$result </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> curl_exec</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

$code </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> curl_getinfo</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

</span><span class="kwd">if</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$code </span><span class="pun">==</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="lit">200</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">&&</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">!(</span><span class="pln"> curl_errno</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">)))</span><span class="pln">
</span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pln">

	</span><span class="com"># TO CONVERT AS ARRAY</span><span class="pln">
	</span><span class="com"># $result = json_decode($result, true);</span><span class="pln">
	</span><span class="com"># $status = $result['status'];</span><span class="pln">

	</span><span class="com"># TO CONVERT AS OBJECT</span><span class="pln">
	$result </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> json_decode</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$result</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

	</span><span class="com"># TRANSACTION INFO</span><span class="pln">
	$status </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">status</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$bank_tran_id </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">bank_tran_id</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$trans_id </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">trans_id</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$refund_ref_id </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">refund_ref_id</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$errorReason </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">errorReason</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">

	</span><span class="com"># API AUTHENTICATION</span><span class="pln">
	$APIConnect </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="typ">APIConnect</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">

</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">else</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pln">

	echo </span><span class="str">"Failed to connect with SSLCOMMERZ"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pln">
</span></pre>								</div>

$refund_ref_id</span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln">urlencode</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">'59bd63fea5455'</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
$store_id</span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln">urlencode</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">"testbox"</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
$store_passwd</span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln">urlencode</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">"qwerty"</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

$requested_url </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">"https://sandbox.sslcommerz.com/validator/api/merchantTransIDvalidationAPI.php?refund_ref_id=$refund_ref_id&store_id=$store_id&store_passwd=$store_passwd&format=json"</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

$handle </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> curl_init</span><span class="pun">();</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> $requested_url</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">true</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">false</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="com"># IF YOU RUN FROM LOCAL PC</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">false</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="com"># IF YOU RUN FROM LOCAL PC</span><span class="pln">

$result </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> curl_exec</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

$code </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> curl_getinfo</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

</span><span class="kwd">if</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$code </span><span class="pun">==</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="lit">200</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">&&</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">!(</span><span class="pln"> curl_errno</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">)))</span><span class="pln">
</span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pln">

	</span><span class="com"># TO CONVERT AS ARRAY</span><span class="pln">
	</span><span class="com"># $result = json_decode($result, true);</span><span class="pln">
	</span><span class="com"># $status = $result['status'];</span><span class="pln">

	</span><span class="com"># TO CONVERT AS OBJECT</span><span class="pln">
	$result </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> json_decode</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$result</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

	</span><span class="com"># TRANSACTION INFO</span><span class="pln">
	$status </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">status</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$bank_tran_id </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">bank_tran_id</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$trans_id </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">trans_id</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$refund_ref_id </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">refund_ref_id</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$errorReason </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">errorReason</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">

	</span><span class="com"># API AUTHENTICATION</span><span class="pln">
	$APIConnect </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="typ">APIConnect</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">

</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">else</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pln">

	echo </span><span class="str">"Failed to connect with SSLCOMMERZ"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pln">
</span></pre>								</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-bc896f0 elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="bc896f0" data-element_type="widget" id="integration9" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a28371d" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<h2 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h2"> Transaction Query API</h2>		</div>

						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-187c65f elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="187c65f" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>You can query your transaction status any time while you want. For ticketing system or product limitation, it will help you to release before recheck.</p>								</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-55a864f elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="55a864f" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a2842b6" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<h4 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h4"> By Session ID</h4>		</div>

						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-7b27f62 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="7b27f62" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									You can check the status of a transaction by the session id<br>
So, Let’s call the API and the example given below								</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-5850904 elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="5850904" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a284e2d" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<h4 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h4"> REST API</h4>		</div>

						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-eba85c4 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="eba85c4" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>API Endpoint (Sandbox/Test Environment): <a href="https://sandbox.sslcommerz.com/validator/api/merchantTransIDvalidationAPI.php" target="_blank" rel="noopener">https://sandbox.sslcommerz.com/validator/api/merchantTransIDvalidationAPI.php</a></p><p>API Endpoint (Live Environment): <a href="https://securepay.sslcommerz.com/validator/api/merchantTransIDvalidationAPI.php" target="_blank" rel="noopener">https://securepay.sslcommerz.com/validator/api/merchantTransIDvalidationAPI.php</a></p><p>Method: GET</p>								</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-30fe399 elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="30fe399" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a285a07" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<h4 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h4"> Request Parameters</h4>		</div>

						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-85a661b elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="85a661b" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<div class="table-responsive">
                        <table class="table table-bordered">
                            <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Param Name</th>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Data Type</th>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Description</th>
                            </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">sessionkey</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – The session id has been generated at the time of transaction initiated.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">store_id</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – Your SSLCOMMERZ Store ID is the integration credential which can be collected through our managers
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">store_passwd</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – Your SSLCOMMERZ Store Password is the integration credential which can be collected through our managers
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>								</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-2efc1ef elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="2efc1ef" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a286635" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<h4 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h4"> Returned Parameters</h4>		</div>

						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-3da7448 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="3da7448" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<div class="table-responsive">
                        <table class="table table-bordered">
                            <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Param Name</th>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Data Type</th>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Description</th>
                            </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">APIConnect</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    API Connection Status –
                                    <ul>
                                        <li><b>INVALID_REQUEST</b> : Invalid data imputed to call the API</li>
                                        <li><b>FAILED</b> : API Authentication Failed</li>
                                        <li><b>INACTIVE</b> : API User/Store ID is Inactive</li>
                                        <li><b><span class="text-success">DONE</span></b> : API Connection Success</li>
                                    </ul>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">status</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (20)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Transaction Status. <span class="text-danger">This parameter needs to be checked before update your database as a successful transaction.</span>
                                    <ul>
                                        <li><b>VALID</b> : A successful transaction.</li>
                                        <li><b>VALIDATED</b> : A successful transaction but called by your end more than one.</li>
                                        <li><b>PENDING</b> : The transaction is still not completed and waiting to get the status.</li>
                                        <li><b>FAILED</b> : The transaction is failed.</li>
                                    </ul>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">sessionkey</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    The session id has been generated at the time of transaction initiated.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">tran_date</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">datetime</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Transaction date – Payment completion date as 2016-05-08 15:53:49 ( PHP date(‘Y-m-d H:i:s’) )
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">tran_id</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Transaction ID (Unique) that was sent by you during initiation. <span class="text-danger">This parameter needs to be validated with your system database for security</span>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">val_id</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    A Validation ID against the Transaction which is provided by SSLCOMMERZ.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">amount</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">decimal (10,2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    The total amount sent by you. However, it could be changed based on currency type. <span class="text-danger">This parameter needs to be validated with your system database for security</span>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">store_amount</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">decimal (10,2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    The amount what you will get in your account after bank charge ( Example: 100 BDT will be your store amount of 96 BDT after 4% Bank Commission )
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">card_type</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    The Bank Gateway Name that customer selected
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">card_no</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (80)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Customer’s Card number. However, for Mobile Banking and Internet Banking, it will return customer’s reference id.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">currency</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (3)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Currency Type which will be settled with your merchant account after deducting the Gateway charges. This parameter is the currency type of the parameter <b>amount</b>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">bank_tran_id</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (80)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    The transaction ID at Banks End
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">card_issuer</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Issuer Bank Name
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">card_brand</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    VISA, MASTER, AMEX, IB or MOBILE BANKING
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">card_issuer_country</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Country of Card Issuer Bank
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">card_issuer_country_code</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    2 digits short code of Country of Card Issuer Bank
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">currency_type</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (3)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    The currency you have sent during initiation of this transaction. If the currency is different than BDT, then it will be converted to BDT by the current conversion rate. <span class="text-danger">This parameter needs to be validated with your system database for security</span>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">currency_amount</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">decimal (10,2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    The currency amount you have sent during initiation of this transaction. If the amount is not mentioned in BDT, then it will be converted to BDT by the current conversion rate and return by the above field <b>amount</b>. <span class="text-danger">This parameter needs to be validated with your system database for security</span>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">emi_instalment</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">integer (2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Tenure of the EMI transaction which is choosen by the customer.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">emi_amount</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">decimal (10,2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    EMI charge which will be paid to the Issuer Bank
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">discount_percentage</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">decimal (10,2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    If customer gets any discount based on the campaign is managed by both you and SSLCOMMERZ.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">discount_remarks</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Short description of the campaign which is managed by both you and SSLCOMMERZ.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">value_a</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Same Value will be returned as Passed during initiation
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">value_b</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Same Value will be returned as Passed during initiation
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">value_c</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Same Value will be returned as Passed during initiation
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">value_d</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Same Value will be returned as Passed during initiation
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">risk_level</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">integer (1)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Transaction’s Risk Level – High (1) for most risky transactions and Low (0) for safe transactions. Please hold the service and proceed to collect customer verification documents
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">risk_title</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Transaction’s Risk Level Decription
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>								</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-d2a706a elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="d2a706a" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<pre class="prettyprint prettyprinted" style=""><span class="pln">
GET validator</span><span class="pun">/</span><span class="pln">api</span><span class="pun">/</span><span class="pln">merchantTransIDvalidationAPI</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pln">php

</span><span class="typ">Request</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="typ">Example</span><span class="pln">

$ curl </span><span class="pun">-</span><span class="pln">X GET </span><span class="str">'https://sandbox.sslcommerz.com/validator/api/merchantTransIDvalidationAPI.php?sessionkey=C3329C5E252DF44B323D9BAF47ACBCD9&store_id=testbox&store_passwd=qwerty&format=json'</span><span class="pln">


</span><span class="typ">Response</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="typ">Example</span><span class="pln">

</span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pln">
  </span><span class="str">"status"</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"VALID"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln">
  </span><span class="str">"sessionkey"</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"C3329C5E252DF44B323D9BAF47ACBCD9"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln">
  </span><span class="str">"tran_date"</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"2017-09-20 23:37:56"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln">
  </span><span class="str">"tran_id"</span><span class="pun">:</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"59C2A4F6432F8"</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln">

				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-337306d elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="337306d" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">

		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a287d5a" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<h4 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h4"> <span style="background-color:#003E78;color:#fff;padding:3px">PHP Code</span> to Get Transaction Info By Session ID</h4>		</div>

				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-9821e37 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="9821e37" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<pre class="prettyprint prettyprinted" style=""><span class="pln">
$sessionkey</span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln">urlencode</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$_POST</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'sessionkey'</span><span class="pun">]);</span><span class="pln">
$store_id</span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln">urlencode</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">"testbox"</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
$store_passwd</span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln">urlencode</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">"qwerty"</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
$requested_url </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">"https://sandbox.sslcommerz.com/validator/api/merchantTransIDvalidationAPI.php?sessionkey="</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pln">$sessionkey</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="str">"&store_id="</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pln">$store_id</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="str">"&store_passwd="</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pln">$store_passwd</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="str">"&v=1&format=json"</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

$handle </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> curl_init</span><span class="pun">();</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> $requested_url</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">true</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">false</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="com"># IF YOU RUN FROM LOCAL PC</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">false</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="com"># IF YOU RUN FROM LOCAL PC</span><span class="pln">

$result </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> curl_exec</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

$code </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> curl_getinfo</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

</span><span class="kwd">if</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$code </span><span class="pun">==</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="lit">200</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">&&</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">!(</span><span class="pln"> curl_errno</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">)))</span><span class="pln">
</span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pln">

	</span><span class="com"># TO CONVERT AS ARRAY</span><span class="pln">
	</span><span class="com"># $result = json_decode($result, true);</span><span class="pln">
	</span><span class="com"># $status = $result['status'];</span><span class="pln">

	</span><span class="com"># TO CONVERT AS OBJECT</span><span class="pln">
	$result </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> json_decode</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$result</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

	</span><span class="com"># TRANSACTION INFO</span><span class="pln">
	$status </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">status</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$tran_date </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">tran_date</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$tran_id </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">tran_id</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$val_id </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">val_id</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$amount </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">amount</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$store_amount </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">store_amount</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$bank_tran_id </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">bank_tran_id</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$card_type </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">card_type</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">

	</span><span class="com"># EMI INFO</span><span class="pln">
	$emi_ instalment </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">emi_instalment</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$emi_ amount </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">emi_ amount</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$emi_description </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">emi_description</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$emi_issuer </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">emi_issuer</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">

	</span><span class="com"># ISSUER INFO</span><span class="pln">
	$card_no </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">card_no</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$card_issuer </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">card_issuer</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$card_brand </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">card_brand</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$card_issuer_country </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">card_issuer_country</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$card_issuer_country_code </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">card_issuer_country_code</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">

	</span><span class="com"># API AUTHENTICATION</span><span class="pln">
	$APIConnect </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="typ">APIConnect</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$validated_on </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">validated_on</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	$gw_version </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">-></span><span class="pln">gw_version</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">

</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">else</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pln">

	echo </span><span class="str">"Failed to connect with SSLCOMMERZ"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pln">
</span></pre>								</div>

				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-388634c elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="388634c" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">

		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a288b56" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<h4 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h4"> By Transaction ID</h4>		</div>

				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-de12766 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="de12766" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>You can check the status of a transaction by your transaction id.<br>So, Let’s call the API and the example given below</p>								</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-47b5291 elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="47b5291" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a2896a9" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<h4 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h4"> REST API</h4>		</div>

						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-18e2d0d elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="18e2d0d" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>API Endpoint (Sandbox/Test Environment): <a href="https://sandbox.sslcommerz.com/validator/api/merchantTransIDvalidationAPI.php" target="_blank" rel="noopener">https://sandbox.sslcommerz.com/validator/api/merchantTransIDvalidationAPI.php</a></p><p>API Endpoint (Live Environment): <a href="https://securepay.sslcommerz.com/validator/api/merchantTransIDvalidationAPI.php" target="_blank" rel="noopener">https://securepay.sslcommerz.com/validator/api/merchantTransIDvalidationAPI.php</a></p><p>Method: GET</p>								</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-2166e17 elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="2166e17" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a28a143" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<h4 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h4"> Request Parameters</h4>		</div>

						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-841e3bf elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="841e3bf" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<div class="table-responsive">
                        <table class="table table-bordered">
                            <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Param Name</th>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Data Type</th>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Description</th>
                            </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">tran_id</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – Transaction ID (Unique) that was sent by you during initiation.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">store_id</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – Your SSLCOMMERZ Store ID is the integration credential which can be collected through our managers
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">store_passwd</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    <span class="label label-danger">Mandatory</span> – Your SSLCOMMERZ Store Password is the integration credential which can be collected through our managers
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>								</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-ef31911 elementor-widget elementor-widget-hub_fancy_heading" data-id="ef31911" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="hub_fancy_heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					
		<div id="ld-fancy-heading-69bc20a28ad73" class="ld-fancy-heading pos-rel">
			<h4 class="ld-fh-element d-inline-block pos-rel  elementor-heading-title lqd-highlight-classic lqd-highlight-grow-left h4"> Returned Parameters</h4>		</div>

						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-8f1c6ad elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="8f1c6ad" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<div class="table-responsive">
                        <table class="table table-bordered">
                            <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Param Name</th>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Data Type</th>
                                <th style="text-align: left">Description</th>
                            </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">APIConnect</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    API Connection Status –
                                    <ul>
                                        <li><b>INVALID_REQUEST</b> : Invalid data imputed to call the API</li>
                                        <li><b>FAILED</b> : API Authentication Failed</li>
                                        <li><b>INACTIVE</b> : API User/Store ID is Inactive</li>
                                        <li><b><span class="text-success">DONE</span></b> : API Connection Success</li>
                                    </ul>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">no_of_trans_found</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">integer (2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    No of transaction is found against the transaction id.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">element</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">json</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Details of individual transactions.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">element.[].status</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (20)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Transaction Status. <span class="text-danger">This parameter needs to be checked before update your database as a successful transaction.</span>
                                    <ul>
                                        <li><b>VALID</b> : A successful transaction.</li>
                                        <li><b>VALIDATED</b> : A successful transaction but called by your end more than one.</li>
                                        <li><b>PENDING</b> : The transaction is still not completed and waiting to get the status.</li>
                                        <li><b>FAILED</b> : The transaction is failed.</li>
                                    </ul>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">element.[].tran_date</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">datetime</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Transaction date – Payment completion date as 2016-05-08 15:53:49 ( PHP date(‘Y-m-d H:i:s’) )
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">element.[].tran_id</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Transaction ID (Unique) that was sent by you during initiation. <span class="text-danger">This parameter needs to be validated with your system database for security</span>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">element.[].val_id</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    A Validation ID against the Transaction which is provided by SSLCOMMERZ.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">element.[].amount</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">decimal (10,2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    The total amount sent by you. However, it could be changed based on currency type. <span class="text-danger">This parameter needs to be validated with your system database for security</span>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">element.[].store_amount</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">decimal (10,2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    The amount what you will get in your account after bank charge ( Example: 100 BDT will be your store amount of 96 BDT after 4% Bank Commission )
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">element.[].card_type</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    The Bank Gateway Name that customer selected
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">element.[].card_no</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (80)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Customer’s Card number. However, for Mobile Banking and Internet Banking, it will return customer’s reference id.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">element.[].currency</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (3)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Currency Type which will be settled with your merchant account after deducting the Gateway charges. This parameter is the currency type of the parameter <b>amount</b>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">element.[].bank_tran_id</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (80)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    The transaction ID at Banks End
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">element.[].card_issuer</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Issuer Bank Name
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">element.[].card_brand</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (30)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    VISA, MASTER, AMEX, IB or MOBILE BANKING
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">element.[].card_issuer_country</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Country of Card Issuer Bank
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">element.[].card_issuer_country_code</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    2 digits short code of Country of Card Issuer Bank
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">element.[].currency_type</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (3)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    The currency you have sent during initiation of this transaction. If the currency is different than BDT, then it will be converted to BDT by the current conversion rate. <span class="text-danger">This parameter needs to be validated with your system database for security</span>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">element.[].currency_amount</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">decimal (10,2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    The currency amount you have sent during initiation of this transaction. If the amount is not mentioned in BDT, then it will be converted to BDT by the current conversion rate and return by the above field <b>amount</b>. <span class="text-danger">This parameter needs to be validated with your system database for security</span>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">element.[].emi_instalment</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">integer (2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Tenure of the EMI transaction which is choosen by the customer.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">element.[].emi_amount</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">decimal (10,2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    EMI charge which will be paid to the Issuer Bank
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">element.[].discount_percentage</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">decimal (10,2)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    If customer gets any discount based on the campaign is managed by both you and SSLCOMMERZ.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">element.[].discount_remarks</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Short description of the campaign which is managed by both you and SSLCOMMERZ.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">element.[].value_a</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Same Value will be returned as Passed during initiation
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">element.[].value_b</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Same Value will be returned as Passed during initiation
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">element.[].value_c</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Same Value will be returned as Passed during initiation
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">element.[].value_d</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Same Value will be returned as Passed during initiation
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">element.[].risk_level</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">integer (1)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">
                                    Transaction’s Risk Level – High (1) for most risky transactions and Low (0) for safe transactions. Please hold the service and proceed to collect customer verification documents
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">element.[].risk_title</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (50)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">

                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td style="text-align: left"><code class="highlighter-rouge">element.[].error</code></td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">string (255)</td>
                                <td style="text-align: left">

                                </td>

                        </table>

									<pre class="prettyprint prettyprinted" style=""><span class="pln">
$tran_id</span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln">urlencode</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$_POST</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'tran_id'</span><span class="pun">]);</span><span class="pln">
