$requested_url </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="str">"https://sandbox.sslcommerz.com/validator/api/merchantTransIDvalidationAPI.php?tran_id="</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pln">$tran_id</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="str">"&store_id="</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pln">$store_id</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="str">"&store_passwd="</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="pln">$store_passwd</span><span class="pun">.</span><span class="str">"&v=1&format=json"</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

$handle </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> curl_init</span><span class="pun">();</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> $requested_url</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">true</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">false</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="com"># IF YOU RUN FROM LOCAL PC</span><span class="pln">
curl_setopt</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">false</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="com"># IF YOU RUN FROM LOCAL PC</span><span class="pln">

$result </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> curl_exec</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

$code </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> curl_getinfo</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">

$whether_give_the_service </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">false</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">

$t_status </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">""</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">

</span><span class="kwd">if</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$code </span><span class="pun">==</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="lit">200</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">&&</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">!(</span><span class="pln"> curl_errno</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$handle</span><span class="pun">)))</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pln">

	</span><span class="com"># JSON CONVERT T</span><span class="pln">
	$result </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> json_decode</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$result</span><span class="pun">,</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">true</span><span class="pun">);</span><span class="pln">
	</span><span class="kwd">if</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">isset</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$result</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'APIConnect'</span><span class="pun">])</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">&&</span><span class="pln"> $result</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'APIConnect'</span><span class="pun">]==</span><span class="str">'DONE'</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pln">

				$status </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $t</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'status'</span><span class="pun">];</span><span class="pln">

				$risk_title </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $t</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'risk_title'</span><span class="pun">];</span><span class="pln">
				$risk_level </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $t</span><span class="pun">[</span><span class="str">'risk_level'</span><span class="pun">];</span><span class="pln">

				</span><span class="com"># TAKE LATEST STATUS</span><span class="pln">
				$t_status </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> $status</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">

				</span><span class="kwd">if</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$status</span><span class="pun">==</span><span class="str">'VALID'</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pln">	</span><span class="com"># CHECK CONDITIONS</span><span class="pln">
					$t_status </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"Successful Transaction, Please check AMOUNT with your System. "</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
					</span><span class="kwd">if</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$risk_level</span><span class="pun">==</span><span class="str">'1'</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pln">
						$t_status </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"Payment is Risky"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
					</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pln">
					</span><span class="kwd">break</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">

				</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">else</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">if</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$status</span><span class="pun">==</span><span class="str">'VALIDATED'</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pln">
					$t_status </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"Successful Transaction already validated by you, Please check AMOUNT with your System. "</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
					</span><span class="kwd">if</span><span class="pun">(</span><span class="pln">$risk_level</span><span class="pun">==</span><span class="str">'1'</span><span class="pun">)</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pln">
						$t_status </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"Payment is Risky"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
					</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pln">
					</span><span class="kwd">break</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
				</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pln">
			</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pln">
		</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">else</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pln">	</span><span class="com"># NO SUCCESSFUL RECORD</span><span class="pln">
			$t_status </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"No Record Found"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
		</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pln">
	</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">else</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pln">	</span><span class="com"># INVALID STORE ID AND PASSWORD</span><span class="pln">
		$t_status </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"API Connection Failed"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
	</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pln">
</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="kwd">else</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="pun">{</span><span class="pln">	</span><span class="com"># UNABLE TO CONNECT WITH SSLCOMMERZ</span><span class="pln">
	$t_status </span><span class="pun">=</span><span class="pln"> </span><span class="str">"Failed to connect with SSLCOMMERZ"</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
</span><span class="pun">}</span><span class="pln">

echo $t_status</span><span class="pun">;</span><span class="pln">
</span></pre>								</div>
				</div>

			<script>
				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

    <style>.bot_card_top {
  width: 340px;
  height: 110px;
  box-shadow: 2px 15px 20px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 6%);
  border-radius: 10px;
  position: fixed;
  bottom: 130px;
  right: 46px;
  background-color: white;
  z-index: 99999;
}

.bot_card_header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  bottom: 33px;
  position: relative;
}

.bot_card_header img {
  width: 70px;
  height: 70px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  box-shadow: 2px 15px 20px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 6%);
  background: white;
}

.bot_card_body {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  max-width: 280px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  bottom: 42px;
  position: relative;
  height: 80%;
  align-items: center;
  text-align: center;
}

.bot_card_body p {
  text-align: center;
  word-break: break-word;
}

.button-toggle-container-cici {
  border: none;
  outline: none;
  height: 30px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  position: absolute;
  top: 40px;
  right: 8px;
  width: 30px;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  font-size: 59px;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.bd-placeholder-img {
  font-size: 1.125rem;
  text-anchor: middle;
  -webkit-user-select: none;
  -moz-user-select: none;
  -ms-user-select: none;
  user-select: none;
}
@media (min-width: 768px) {
  .bd-placeholder-img-lg {
    font-size: 3.5rem;
  }
}
:root {
  --base_color: #2a5da8;
  --text_color: #ffffff;
}
iframe#ssl_bot_dom_iframe {
  display: initial;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100% !important;
  border: none;
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0;
  right: 0;
  background: transparent;
  display: none;
}
